subject: [PATCH v5 20/21] nfsd: track requested dir attributes

2026-05-22.patch_summary: This patch updates the NFS server to track the union of requested and supported directory attributes in the delegation. This change will be used later to ensure that only the relevant attributes are encoded when sending add, remove, or rename operations. The patch modifies several files, including nfsd/nfs4proc.c and nfsd/nfs4state.c, to update the handling of directory attributes and notifications.
